scenarios.title: Worker Sudden Trip in Robot Path

event.description: The human worker trips over a small floor joint and stumbles directly into the oncoming path of the robot carrying the cardboard box.

position_deltas.reason: Slightly forward start point to reduce distance to potential collision area.
Shifted closer to the center aisle to facilitate the tripping event path.

action_timeline.action: robot_01 walks forward along the aisle carrying box_01 with both hands while worker_01 walks parallel to the racks.
worker_01 trips and stumbles leftward, losing balance and falling directly into the path of robot_01.
robot_01 detects the obstacle, initiates an emergency stop, and braces box_01 to prevent it from sliding out of its grip.

scenarios.expected_robot_response: The robot immediately halts its forward motion, engages its joint brakes, and shifts its weight backward to secure the cardboard box and prevent contact with the fallen worker.
scenarios.video_prompt: Realistic, slightly grainy surveillance camera footage, static high-angle perspective, natural color grading, non-cinematic, authentic warehouse security feed aesthetic. Setting: A straight warehouse aisle, 3.2 meters wide, bordered on both sides by tall, industrial steel storage racks painted orange and blue. The racks are filled with wooden pallets holding various shrink-wrapped brown boxes., Polished, light grey industrial concrete floor with visible expansion joints and painted bright yellow safety boundary lines running parallel to the racks on both sides. floor, Even, bright overhead industrial fluorescent tube lighting fixtures, casting realistic, soft-edged shadows directly beneath the objects and actors.. Scene identity anchor: linear_aisle_with_flanking_racks; orange_and_blue_steel_racks_with_palletized_inventory; overhead_fluorescent_grid_cool_white_5000k. Identical across all videos of this series: the same A humanoid robot, 1.75 meters tall, with a matte white and dark grey composite chassis, exposed metallic silver joints at the shoulders, elbows, and knees, and a glowing circular blue LED status indicator on the center of its chest. It has a sleek, faceless head with a black glass visor. (matte composite plastic, brushed aluminum, and tempered glass); the same A male warehouse worker of medium build, wearing a bright neon yellow high-visibility safety vest over a long-sleeved navy blue shirt, dark grey rugged work pants, brown steel-toed boots, and a white industrial hard hat. No visible logos or branding. (fabric, polyester safety mesh, and hard plastic); the same A plain, medium-sized rectangular corrugated cardboard box, light brown in color, measuring 0.4m x 0.4m x 0.3m. The box is sealed along the top center seam with clear, slightly reflective packing tape. It has no text, labels, or barcodes. (corrugated cardboard and adhesive plastic tape). Camera: corner security camera, static, 6 seconds. It has a sleek, faceless head with a black glass visor. robot_01 walks forward along the aisle carrying box_01 with both hands while worker_01 walks parallel to the racks.. verifier_packet.scenario_prompt: Worker Sudden Trip in Robot Path
verifier_packet.expected_outcome: The robot immediately halts its forward motion, engages its joint brakes, and shifts its weight backward to secure the cardboard box and prevent contact with the fallen worker.

object_registry.surface_details: Fine panel gaps on the torso, subtle metallic sheen on the exposed joint actuators, circular blue light emission from the chest.
negative_drift: chassis turning glossy or metallic silver
LED ring changing color to red or green
robot growing wheels or tracks instead of legs

object_registry.surface_details: Fabric folds on the navy blue sleeves, mesh texture on the safety vest, reflective silver stripes on the vest.
negative_drift: vest changing to orange or red
hard hat disappearing or changing color
worker wearing shorts or t-shirt

object_registry.surface_details: Subtle corrugated ridges visible under close inspection, single strip of clear tape reflecting overhead lights.
negative_drift: box morphing into a plastic crate
shipping labels or black text appearing on the box
box changing size or aspect ratio during the video

scene_registry.spatial_map: Aisle center line runs along the Y-axis. Racks are positioned at X = -1.6m and X = 1.6m. Robot starts at Y = 4.0m moving towards Y = 0.0m. Worker starts at X = 1.2m, Y = 2.0m.
negative_drift: racks changing color to green or grey
floor changing to wood or dark asphalt
addition of windows or natural daylight

reference_assets.description: The master layout image showing the empty warehouse aisle with correct lighting, rack placement, and floor markings.
Front view of the humanoid robot standing upright, showing the matte white panels and the blue chest LED.
Front view of the worker wearing the neon yellow vest and white hard hat.
Isometric view of the plain brown cardboard box showing the clear tape seam.
Initial frame for Scenario 1: Robot carrying the box down the center, worker standing near the right rack.

identity_checks.method: VLM color histogram and keypoint tracking on the robot chassis panels.
identity_checks.pass_condition: The chassis must maintain a matte white and dark grey color profile with a blue LED indicator across all frames, with no red or green drift.

identity_checks.method: Object detection bounding box tracking combined with color segmentation for neon yellow.
identity_checks.pass_condition: The worker must wear a neon yellow vest in 100% of the frames where they are visible.

identity_checks.method: Optical flow and geometry consistency check on the box boundaries.
identity_checks.pass_condition: The box must remain a rigid rectangular prism of constant scale while held by the robot.

identity_checks.method: Frame-to-frame structural similarity index (SSIM) on the background racks and floor.
identity_checks.pass_condition: SSIM of the background regions must exceed 0.95 across the entire video duration, confirming a static camera and environment.

consistency_requirements: The humanoid robot must maintain its matte white and grey chassis and blue LED ring.
The worker must wear the high-visibility neon yellow vest and white hard hat.
The warehouse aisle layout, rack positions, and concrete floor markings must remain identical across all variations.
The camera must remain completely static, simulating a fixed security camera.

scenarios.title: Worker Abrupt Path Crossing

event.description: The worker abruptly turns and crosses the safety line into the robot's lane without looking, prompting an immediate path deflection.

position_deltas.reason: Starting slightly further back to allow space for path crossing detection.
Positioned deeper in the side storage rack area before initiating the crossing.

action_timeline.action: robot_01 carries box_01 steadily down the center of the aisle while worker_01 stands near the right-hand storage racks.
worker_01 turns suddenly and walks across the yellow safety line directly into the center of the aisle.
robot_01 decelerates, pivots slightly to the left to clear the worker, and tightly stabilizes box_01 to keep it secure.

scenarios.expected_robot_response: The robot decelerates rapidly, pivots to the left within its safety margin, and dynamically stabilizes the cardboard box to prevent a collision with the crossing worker.

scenarios.title: Worker Backward Step Near-Miss

event.description: The worker takes a sudden backward step to inspect a high shelf, stepping blindly into the oncoming path of the robot.

position_deltas.reason: Slight lateral offset to match the center-right alignment of the aisle.
Placed closer to the rack boundary line to set up the backward motion.

action_timeline.action: robot_01 moves forward at a moderate pace holding box_01 while worker_01 stands facing the shelves.
worker_01 takes a large, blind step backward away from the shelf and into the aisle.
robot_01 stops instantly, tilts box_01 upward closer to its chest, and stands firm to maximize clearance.

scenarios.expected_robot_response: The robot senses the sudden reduction in clearance, immediately executes an emergency brake maneuver, and tilts the box upward to maximize physical clearance from the worker's back.
